# Al Hassa

**Summary**: A region and oasis in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] collected plant samples from Al-Asfar Lake located in the Al-Hassa oasis.

## Key Findings From This Location
